segments.text: Exploring the street food of Lucknow, the city of Nawabs.
From Tunday Kababi's melt-in-the-mouth kebabs to the famous Prakash Ki Kulfi.
Lucknow's food culture is deeply rooted in Awadhi cuisine, known for its slow-cooking techniques and rich spices.
Don't miss the Basket Chaat at Royal Cafe!
